name: libsoapysdr0.8
title: libsoapysdr0.8
description:
software defined radio interface library
SoapySDR is a library providing a common interface to SDR (software
defined radio) hardware. Support for different hardware is added through
external modules.
.
This package contains the shared library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsoapysdr0.8 because software defined radio interface library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsoapysdr0.8 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsoapysdr0.8 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsoapysdr0.8 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
